title: LLM & Transformer Fine-Tuning for Kaggle NLP
summary: Techniques for fine-tuning large language models and transformers in Kaggle competitions. In 2022–2023, DeBERTa-v3-large was the dominant backbone; in 2024, decoder-only LLMs (Llama 3, Gemma 2, Qwen 2) began winning generation/preference tasks. This page covers the tricks that separate top-10 from top-100 in NLP competitions.
